_comment: Selectable cultural knowledge packs for context-dependent topics. A run picks topic (domain) x knowledge_pack; region (and thus language) is derived from the pack's region_id, so a pack can only ever appear with its own region. knowledge_components map name -> mastery (1-5); components below 3 are gaps the student cannot speak to and will say it is unsure about. domain is metadata. No misconceptions: there is no canonical right answer.

knowledge_packs.domain: Social Practices, Rituals, and Festive Events
Social Practices, Rituals, and Festive Events
